title: Blooming Bows
desc: Minnie's nieces are very upset! The paper petals on their costumes are falling apart. Now, it''s up to Minnie to redesign the girls' costumes. But can she do it in time for the school's Posy Pageant?

title: Bow-Bot Robot
desc: Minnie and Daisy get some help from a bow-making robot in this retelling of an episode of Disney Junior's Minnie's Bow Toons.

title: Easter Bonnet Parade
desc: Read along with Disney! One day, a little puppy with nowhere to go arrived at the Main Street USA train station. Seeking for a place to call his own, follow along as the little pup explores the town.

title: Trouble Times Two
desc: Movie star Penelope Poodle has come to Minnie''s Bow-Tique to find something perfect to wear. But when Minnie''s mischievous twin nieces, Millie and Melody, come for a visit, it''s Trouble Times Two!

title: Year Round Fun
desc: Book with magnet set in a case

title: Riches To Rags
desc: A young boy is taken to work by his Papa and Grandpa in an old wooden boat. He discovers his family's unusual line of work and will decide whether to follow them or find his way.

title: Blue-Ribbon Bunny
desc: Sofia and her bunny Clover enter a pet contest. Other kids have fancy pets. Sofia must decide: enter with a fancy pet or stay loyal to her best friend, Clover.

title: Clover Time
desc: When Clover's warren floods, Sofia invites her to move in. They love sharing a room-at first. But Sofia soon learns that being roommates isn't always easy in this fun story!

title: Just One Of The Princes
desc: Sofia wants to try out for a spot on Royal Prep's Flying Derby team, but Amber, Prince Hugo, and her classmates tell Sofia that Flying Derby is not a 'princess thing.'

title: The Missing Necklace
desc: When the Amulet of Avalor goes missing, Sofia loses her ability to understand her friends. Longing to talk to her friends again, Sofia sets off to find it. Cedric is also after the missing amulet.

title: Welcome To Royal Prep
desc: At Royal Prep's Open House, Amber's special painting gets ruined by James! Can Sofia help her fix it before her parents arrive? Find out in this exciting story!

title: Me And Our Mom
desc: Sofia is so excited to spend the day with her mom at the annual Mother's Day Picnic -until she learns that Amber and James are joining too. Sofia wants her mom to herself on Mother's Day!

title: The Curse Of Princess Ivy
desc: In this beautifully illustrated eBook, Sofia faces grave danger when she faces Princess Ivy, a once-exiled princess who is determined to take over Enchancia and turn the whole kingdom black and white.

title: A Royal Mouse In The House
desc: It's the Enchancia Pet Show! Hildegard's mink, Lulu, runs away, and Hildegard turns into a mouse! Sofia and Clover must solve the mystery and reverse the spell before the show begins.

title: Princess Sofia'S Busy Day
desc: Today is another busy day in the kingdom of Enchancia for Princess Sofia. Join Sofia and see what an ordinary day is like for this new princess!

title: Royal Fun
desc: Life in Enchancia is full of fun! Join Sofia as she explores all the fun things there are to do-from dancing to joining the flying derby team and even spending the day at the Village Faire.

title: Sofia The First
desc: Sofia was a little girl who lived a rather ordinary life. But everything changed when her mother married the king.

title: The Amulet And The Anthem
desc: Sofia is chosen to sing the Enchancian Anthem at the annual Harvest Festival. After she becomes a bit too boastful, Sofia's magical amulet bestows a curse on her, leaving her all croaked up!

title: The Enchanted Science Fair
desc: When Sofia and her friends discover that they need to find a magical ingredient at the top of a mountain, they compete to see who can reach the summit first! Can Sofia convince her fellow students.

title: A Mother's Love
desc: Follow Princess Merida and her mother Queen Elinor on an epic adventure set in the Highlands of Scotland. When a beastly curse is unleashed upon the kingdom, Merida must try and set things right.

title: Oh, Brother
desc: Meet Merida, a fearless princess with three siblings who are in trouble. Read and listen to the story to learn what happens when they transform into bear cubs. Will Merida rescue them in time?

title: One Perfect Day
desc: Despite being instructed to behave like a typical princess, Disney's Princess Merida desires to practice archery, explore the kingdom, and be herself for a day.

title: The Great Cat-tastrophe
desc: Cinderella agrees to help Lady Dupont watch the cats, Cinderella finds a clever way for them to lend a hand on her chores. Follow along as Cinderella and the cats tidy up the house together.

title: Moana Finds The Way
desc: Moana sets sail on a great adventure across the ocean. Follow along with the word for word narration.

title: Quest For The Heart
desc: Read along with Disney! Moana and Maui set out on an important voyage. Can they work together? Follow along with the word for word narration to find out!

title: Honor For Father
desc: Enjoy quick stories with Disney and Pixar girls! Join Moana, Helen Parr, and others on fun adventures. Perfect for bedtime reading in just five minutes!

title: Listen To Your Heart
desc: Pocahontas faces a tough choice. English settlers arrive, threatening her land and people. She must choose between her heart and protecting her village, seeking a path to peace.

title: The Fight For Kumandra
desc: It's up to Raya to find the last dragon and save the world of Kumandra!

title: Buttercup The Brave
desc: Aurora's new horse is called Buttercup. The princess is confident in his discipline, but she starts to have second thoughts when Buttercup starts to tremble while riding through the forest.

title: Maleficent
desc: Maleficent, uninvited to Aurora's birth celebration, curses her. The curse can only be broken by a prince. Years later, Maleficent seeks Aurora.

title: Stitch'S Day At School
desc: Get ready for fun! This book has stories about Disney and Pixar's furry friends. Read about puppies, dogs, and Stitch's adventures. Perfect for any time!

title: Disney Classic Stories: Planes
desc: Dusty wants to race planes around the world. He's a crop duster with big dreams. Friends help Dusty reach new heights. It's a retelling of the movie Planes!

title: Feast
desc: Winston the Boston Terrier loves his life with his owner, especially the shared snacks. But a new girlfriend brings healthier food, changing their routine .

title: Haunted Hayride
desc: Phineas and Ferb build a giant Halloween corn maze and hayride, but Dr. Doof creates a monster to destroy their town.

title: Bayou Keeps The Beat
desc: Bayou, Tiana's pony, learns Louis is missing before a big show. Bayou and Lily team up to find him, hoping to get Louis back before his performance starts, and they embark on their adventure.

title: Aurora's Homemade Holiday
desc: Read along with Disney! With this sweet collection of Disney Christmas stories, little ones are sure to be carried off to sleep full of holiday cheer.

title: Driving Buddies
desc: Lightning McQueen, a race car, gets lost and finds friends in a small town. He learns important life lessons. Get ready for an exciting adventure!

title: Rescue Squad Mater
desc: If there is a fire in Radiator Springs, Rescue Squad Mater is on the job! One day his best friend Lightning McQueen gets trapped in a burning building, and itis up to Mater to save him.

title: Tails, Tricks, And Traps
desc: A fun-filled animated series packed with adventures, pranks, and laughter, showing how characters' mischief creates entertaining, lighthearted, and playful stories.

title: Super Spies
desc: All the world's a racetrack as superstar Lightning McQueen zooms back into action, with his best friend Mater in tow, to take on the globe's fastest and finest in DisneyPixar Cars 2.

title: Planes Fire And Rescue
desc: Join Dusty and Blade Ranger in Planes: Fire and Rescue as they team up to battle a massive wildfire, proving that true heroes come in all shapes and sizes.

title: Tink'N About Animals
desc: Fawn teaches her fairy friends all about animal groups!

title: Ocean Of Color
desc: Share the magic of storytelling with Dory! Red, green, yellow, and blue! What other colors does Dory see under the sea?

title: A Friend In Need
desc: Nemo and friends explore Kelp Canyon with Marlon and Dory. Marlon gets itchy, Bruce leads, and they find a spooky pirate ship. Bruce makes a friend!

title: The Ghost Light Fish
desc: Nemo and his classmates meet a very special fish and learn a helpful science lesson. Follow along with word-for-word narration as Nemo and his friends learn to never judge a fish by his fins.

title: Frankenweenie
desc: Victor Frankenstein uses lightning to revive his dog, Sparky, with some changes. He hides Sparky, but others learn his secret and want to revive their pets too.

title: A Cool Contest
desc: Kristoff and Anna compete in an ice-carving contest and Elsa is the judge. Kristoff is an ice expert, but Anna has never carved ice before.

title: A Tale Of Two Sisters
desc: Elsa and Anna are the royal sisters of Arendelle. When Elsa becomes queen, she accidentally creates a snowstorm in the entire kingdom! Meet a funny snowman. See if the sisters can save the kingdom.

title: Across The Sea
desc: Elsa and Anna take a journey across the sea to tour royal kingdoms. Every time they make a stop, someone asks to see Elsa's magical powers.

title: An Icy Monster
desc: Kristoff and Sven see something big in the mountains. Elsa, Anna, and Olaf agree to help the friends find it. The snow makes it hard for them to look for the monster, but Elsa has an idea.

title: Anna In Charge
desc: When Elsa has to leave Arendelle for a day, Anna is left in charge! Princess Anna, Queen Elsa, Olaf the snowman, and all the characters from Disney's.

title: Big Snowman, Little Snowman
desc: Join the main characters of Frozen as they demonstrate a variety of fun and silly opposites.

title: Hello, Olaf
desc: We all know Olaf loves warm hugs, but did you know he also wants to go sailing? Find out even more about this adorable snowman.

title: Olaf'S Birthday
desc: Anna and Elsa plan a surprise party for Olaf. They need to distract him while friends prepare. The trio embarks on a fun day, but can they keep the party a secret from Olaf?

title: The Spring Parade
desc: Elsa and Anna want to have the spring parade this year. There is a lot to plan. Anna has trouble finding a horse to ride for the parade until Kristoff has an idea.

title: A Sister More Like Me
desc: Explore a wintery world of magic in this spirited look at sibling relationships of two sister Anna and Elsa.

title: An Amazing Snowman
desc: This charmingly illustrated storybook features everyone's favorite snowman, Olaf. Olaf is a very special snowman - he sings, he dances, and he has big dreams that he loves to share.

title: Anna & Elsa: A New Reindeer Friend
desc: Anna, Elsa, and Olaf rescue a reindeer before a ball. They face a challenge to arrive on time. This story shows friendship and adventure.

title: Anna & Elsa: Across The Sea
desc: Elsa and Anna travel to other kingdoms. People want to see Elsa's powers, but she is scared. Can Anna help Elsa be brave during their trip?

title: Anna & Elsa: Babysitting The Troll Tots
desc: Join your friends from Frozen for silly babysitting adventures in Troll Valley. From troublesome trolls to a surprise helper, you'll enjoy this warm-hearted adventure with word for word narration.

title: Anna & Elsa: Olaf'S Perfect Summer Day
desc: Summer is here in Arendelle, and Olaf is very happy! He loves summer days. This story follows Olaf as he enjoys his perfect day in the warm weather.

title: Anna & Elsa's Childhood Times
desc: King Agnarr and Queen Iduna have just welcomed royal guests to their kingdom! If all goes well, Arendelle will have new trade partners-but can Anna and Elsa stay out of trouble.

title: Anna & Elsa'S Winter'S End Festival
desc: Anna and Elsa plan a party for their mom, a Winter's End Festival. Olaf, Oaken, and a reindeer help. Read the story and join their fun.

title: Anna, Elsa, and the Secret River
desc: A picture book timed to the release of Walt Disney Animation Studios' Frozen 2

title: Bulda's Crystal
desc: As Kristoff, Sven and Bulda relax around the campfire, one of Bulda's crystals begins to flicker and fade! Can Kristoff and his friends harness the power of the Northern Lights and recharge Bulda's crystal?

title: Do You Want A Hug
desc: Olaf, the friendly snowman, loves warm hugs and playing games! Join him in a fun-filled hide-and-seek adventure. Count to ten and listen to the narration as Olaf shares his warm hugs.

title: Elsa's Gift
desc: Queen Elsa and Princess Anna are hosting a ball for the people of Arendelle. Elsa knows it's the perfect time to show everyone how much she loves her sister. But can Elsa find the right gift for Anna?

title: Frozen 2: Welcome Home
desc: Lieutenant Mattias returns to Arendelle after a long absence. Anna shows him around, revealing how much the kingdom has changed. He realizes that home is the best place to be.

title: Melting Hearts
desc: Anna and her friends are having a picnic! On the way to the picnic spot, Olaf plucks a heart-shaped petal from a flower. Then, Anna finds a heart-shaped leaf, too! Soon, everyone is joining in the fun!

title: Olaf Gives Thanks
desc: Olaf shares what he's thankful for, like flowers and winter breezes, in a charming rhyming story. This picture book, filled with lovely illustrations, will enchant young readers.

title: Olaf'S Frozen Adventure
desc: Arendelle celebrates its first holiday in years, but Anna and Elsa forgot their traditions. Olaf seeks the perfect new tradition in an exciting adventure.

title: Olaf's Summer Day
desc: Join Olaf the snowman as he imagines all the things he would do during his perfect summer day! He dreams of relaxing on a beach, making water angels and drinking hot chocolate filled with marshmallows.

title: One For The Books
desc: Olaf loves reading and visiting Arendelle's library. When the librarian leaves, Anna makes Olaf the substitute! He shares his joy, but the library is changed. Will the librarian mind?

title: We'Ll Always Have Each Other
desc: The seasons are changing in Arendelle, and fall has arrived. Follow along with word-for-word narration as Anna and Olaf discover that even with a new season, there are some things that never change.

title: Elsa'S Epic Journey
desc: Elsa follows a mysterious voice north on a quest to discover why she has magic powers!

title: Spirits Of Nature
desc: Elsa meets the spirits of nature who live in the Enchanted Forest!

title: Family Game Night
desc: Enjoy the journey with your favorite Disney and Pixar characters during bedtime. Play some games with Anna and Elsa, watch Minnie's cat with Mickey and the nephews, and embark on a Scamp adventure.

title: Frozen 2
desc: Elsa, Anna, and friends go to the Enchanted Forest. They want to know about the past and Elsa's power. The story follows their adventure closely.

title: The Official Portrait
desc: Anna needs a royal portrait, but interruptions plague the painting process. Alf, the painter, struggles until his son Finn devises a clever solution, saving the portrait session.

title: The Huggleball Game
desc: Go Hugglemonsters! Henry and his friends challenge the grown-up Hugglemonsters to a game of Huggleball. As co-captains, will Henry and Summer find a way to work together as a team?

desc: When Clover's warren floods, Sofia invites her to move in. They love sharing a room-at first. But Sofia soon learns that being roommates isn't always easy in this fun story!

title: Just One Of The Princes
desc: Sofia wants to try out for a spot on Royal Prep's Flying Derby team, but Amber, Prince Hugo, and her classmates tell Sofia that Flying Derby is not a 'princess thing.'

title: The Missing Necklace
desc: When the Amulet of Avalor goes missing, Sofia loses her ability to understand her friends. Longing to talk to her friends again, Sofia sets off to find it. Cedric is also after the missing amulet.

title: Welcome To Royal Prep
desc: At Royal Prep's Open House, Amber's special painting gets ruined by James! Can Sofia help her fix it before her parents arrive? Find out in this exciting story!

title: Me And Our Mom
desc: Sofia is so excited to spend the day with her mom at the annual Mother's Day Picnic -until she learns that Amber and James are joining too. Sofia wants her mom to herself on Mother's Day!

title: The Curse Of Princess Ivy
desc: In this beautifully illustrated eBook, Sofia faces grave danger when she faces Princess Ivy, a once-exiled princess who is determined to take over Enchancia and turn the whole kingdom black and white.

title: A Royal Mouse In The House
desc: It's the Enchancia Pet Show! Hildegard's mink, Lulu, runs away, and Hildegard turns into a mouse! Sofia and Clover must solve the mystery and reverse the spell before the show begins.

title: Princess Sofia'S Busy Day
desc: Today is another busy day in the kingdom of Enchancia for Princess Sofia. Join Sofia and see what an ordinary day is like for this new princess!

title: Royal Fun
desc: Life in Enchancia is full of fun! Join Sofia as she explores all the fun things there are to do-from dancing to joining the flying derby team and even spending the day at the Village Faire.

title: Sofia The First
desc: Sofia was a little girl who lived a rather ordinary life. But everything changed when her mother married the king.

title: The Amulet And The Anthem
desc: Sofia is chosen to sing the Enchancian Anthem at the annual Harvest Festival. After she becomes a bit too boastful, Sofia's magical amulet bestows a curse on her, leaving her all croaked up!

title: The Enchanted Science Fair
desc: When Sofia and her friends discover that they need to find a magical ingredient at the top of a mountain, they compete to see who can reach the summit first! Can Sofia convince her fellow students.

title: Happy Valentine'S Day
desc: Celebrate Valentine's Day with Mickey, Minnie, and friends! Enjoy three sweet stories about sharing love and fun. Perfect for preschoolers learning about Valentine's traditions.

title: One Unicorny Day
desc: All your favorite Disney Junior characters are present in this anthology of stories. Join Zany's adventures with Mickey and friends and complete missions with Bingo and Rolly.

title: A Walk In The Park
desc: Minnie, Daisy, and Cuckoo-Loca enjoy a dog walk until a hot dog cart appears. The pups chase it, leading to chaos. Minnie tries to regain control before things get too ruff!

title: Vote For Minnie
desc: Minnie runs for president of the Adventure Club. But Pete is also running! Who will win and be elected the next president?

title: The Haunted Halloween
desc: With this collection of spooky Halloween stories, little ones will be tricked and treated off to sleep with some of their favorite Disney and Pixar characters.

title: Race For The Rigatoni Ribbon
desc: Mickey and the gang head to Italy to compete in the Race for the Rigatoni Ribbon. Do the Roadster Racers have a chance at winning the race? Follow along with word-for-word narration to find out!

title: Colors All Around
desc: Join Mickey, Minnie, and the rest of the gane as they search for their favorite colors. Follow along with word-for-word narration and help them find all the colors in the rainbow!

title: Mickey's Halloween Treat
desc: Mickey and his friends want to go to the Tower, for the Halloween party but, they have to get there before the moon is full! Toodles and Mouseketools are what Mickey need to find on his way to the tower.

title: Homesick
desc: Being sick is no fun for anyone, but Funny's sneezes are extra funny! Every sneeze sends Mickey, Minnie, and the rest of the gang through the wrong Adventure Doors. Will Funny ever feel better?

title: Mickey'S Perfecto Day
desc: Mickey and the Roadster Racers head to Madrid, Spain for some racing and sightseeing fun. But when a baby bull begins to chase them around town, their perfecto vacation starts to crumble!

title: Ski Trippin
desc: The gang is teaching Daisy to ski when she accidentally ends up in the middle of aa big skiing race! Using the skills she's learned along the way, can she pull off a big win?

title: Trouble Times Two
desc: Movie star Penelope Poodle has come to Minnie''s Bow-Tique to find something perfect to wear. But when Minnie''s mischievous twin nieces, Millie and Melody, come for a visit, it''s Trouble Times Two!

title: Blue-Ribbon Bunny
desc: Sofia and her bunny Clover enter a pet contest. Other kids have fancy pets. Sofia must decide: enter with a fancy pet or stay loyal to her best friend, Clover.

title: Just One Of The Princes
desc: Sofia wants to try out for a spot on Royal Prep's Flying Derby team, but Amber, Prince Hugo, and her classmates tell Sofia that Flying Derby is not a 'princess thing.'

title: Me And Our Mom
desc: Sofia is so excited to spend the day with her mom at the annual Mother's Day Picnic -until she learns that Amber and James are joining too. Sofia wants her mom to herself on Mother's Day!

title: A Royal Mouse In The House
desc: It's the Enchancia Pet Show! Hildegard's mink, Lulu, runs away, and Hildegard turns into a mouse! Sofia and Clover must solve the mystery and reverse the spell before the show begins.

title: Princess Sofia'S Busy Day
desc: Today is another busy day in the kingdom of Enchancia for Princess Sofia. Join Sofia and see what an ordinary day is like for this new princess!

title: The Amulet And The Anthem
desc: Sofia is chosen to sing the Enchancian Anthem at the annual Harvest Festival. After she becomes a bit too boastful, Sofia's magical amulet bestows a curse on her, leaving her all croaked up!

title: The Halloween Ball
desc: The annual Masquerade Ball is just around the corner and Amber plans to win the Royal Prep costume contest. Amber enlists Cedric's help to magically create a winning costume.

title: The Royal Games
desc: When Sofia's stepbrother James asks her to be his partner in the carriage race, She hopes she'll be up to the task. Their carriage comes in last. She teaches him about the value of being a good sport.

title: The Royal Slumber Party
desc: A Royal Slumber Party! When Sofia invites her friends from the village to her very first royal slumber party, she's excited but nervous, too. What if her old friends don't get along with her new ones?

title: Two Princesses And A Baby
desc: It's Amber and James's birthday. Sofia is excited but Amber isn't excited at all. Follow along with word-for-word narration as Amber comes up with a magical-and disastrous-solution.

title: A Mother's Love
desc: Follow Princess Merida and her mother Queen Elinor on an epic adventure set in the Highlands of Scotland. When a beastly curse is unleashed upon the kingdom, Merida must try and set things right.

title: Big Bear, Little Bear
desc: Enter the world of Brave and learn about opposites.

title: Oh, Brother
desc: Meet Merida, a fearless princess with three siblings who are in trouble. Read and listen to the story to learn what happens when they transform into bear cubs. Will Merida rescue them in time?

title: Merida And The Missing Gem
desc: Join the Disney reading. Merida chooses a beautiful brooch for her mother's birthday, but the pin goes missing, and she, with friends, has to search the castle grounds to find it.

title: One Perfect Day
desc: Despite being instructed to behave like a typical princess, Disney's Princess Merida desires to practice archery, explore the kingdom, and be herself for a day.

title: Cinderella's Best Ever Creations
desc: The story explores how Cinderella must work to create a collection of dresses in a time-crunch. She creates beautiful gowns for girls and solves problems by creating an extra dress in a time crunch.

title: The Great Cat-tastrophe
desc: Cinderella agrees to help Lady Dupont watch the cats, Cinderella finds a clever way for them to lend a hand on her chores. Follow along as Cinderella and the cats tidy up the house together.

title: Kindness And Courage
desc: Ella's stepfamily is jeaous of her beauty and grace and tries to stop her from going to the royal ball. Will Ella make it to the ball and get her happily ever after?

title: Moana Finds The Way
desc: Moana sets sail on a great adventure across the ocean. Follow along with the word for word narration.

title: Beware Of The Kakamora
desc: Read along with Disney! While on their important voyage, Moana and Maui encounter the dangerous Kakamora. Follow along with the word for word narration in this exciting adventure.

title: Moana
desc: Mater is tasked with capturing suspicious vehicles because he is a spy vehicle! See what a spy's life is like for Mater and his friends by following the narration word for word.

title: Moana And The Ocean
desc: An engaging story about Moana's unique relationship with the Ocean that playfully interacts with stylized artwork.

title: Our Perfect Stormy Day
desc: Read along with Disney! When a storm hits the island, Moana, Heihei, and Pua head to Gramma Tala's for story time. Follow along with word-for-word narration as they all enjoy the perfect stormy day!

title: Where Monsters Live
desc: Moana, daughter of chief Tui, embarks on a journey to return the heart of goddess Te Fitti from Maui, a demigod, after the plants and the fish on her island start dying due to a blight.

title: The Guardian Of The Dragon Gem
desc: In Kumandra, Raya, a brave warrior, seeks the last dragon. She gathers a team to restore light and unity to their world. It's a fantasy adventure.

title: Hide-And-Seek
desc: An entertainment program for kids.

title: A Sister More Like Me
desc: Explore a wintery world of magic in this spirited look at sibling relationships of two sister Anna and Elsa.

title: Monsters, Inc
desc: Cinderella's classic talebrings the timeless story of Cinderella to life! She meets the prince of her dreams, her Fairy Godmother, and dances at the royal ball.

title: The Evil Queen
desc: The Evil Queen is no longer the fairest in the land and orders her Huntsman to kill her. But Snow White is alive and living in the forest. Follow the Evil Queen takes matters into her own hands.

title: Love At First Beep
desc: WALL-E, a lonely trash-collecting robot, falls in love with EVE, a probe robot searching for signs of vegetation. Can their robot romance survive? Dive into Disney's magical adventure to find out!

title: Bonnie's First Day Of School
desc: Bonnie is nervous for her first day of kindergarten, but her new friend Forky has an idea! Follow along with word-for-word narration as Forky makes sure Bonnie has a great first day.

title: The Haunted Ship
desc: A thrilling fantasy tale of a haunted ship filled with mystery and adventure. With suspenseful storytelling, it takes viewers on a journey of danger, fear, and discovery.

title: Ratatouille
desc: Read along with Disney*Pixar! Featuring six favorite Disney*Pixar stories, this delightful collection of tales will make bedtime a fun time for little ones!

title: Take Your Pet To The Vet
desc: Doc's hamster, Coleslaw, needs a checkup. But there's one problem . . . Coleslaw isn't a toy, so it's time to take this pet to the vet! .

title: Beyond The Palace Walls
desc: Princess Jasmine has dreams that go far beyond the palace walls. When she ventures into the kingdom beyond her home, will she find the adventure she longs for?

title: Puppy Trouble
desc: Nanny takes all fifteen puppies to play in the park. One of the puppies, Lucky, can be quite a troublemaker. Follow along with word-for-word narration as Lucky makes his way of out of mischief.

title: The Puppies' First Christmas
desc: With this sweet collection of Disney Christmas stories, little ones are sure to be carried off to sleep full of holiday cheer.

title: Thunderbolt Patch
desc: When Patch the puppy notices a mouse in the house, he pretends to be his TV hero, Thunderbolt the Dog and leads the pups on a wild chase after the bandit. Everyone will love the world of 101 Dalmatians.

title: A Lion's Pride
desc: Read along with Disney! Explore the life of a lioness and her cub on the African plains through this photo-filled storybook. Perfect for young fans!

title: A Friend Like Him
desc: Few characters have Aladdin's singing, dancing, and joke-telling Genie's unique, irresistible appeal. This delightful picture book is ideal for any Aladdin fan who imagined having a friend like Genie.

title: A Present For The Queen
desc: Alice searches for a Christmas gift for the Queen of Hearts.

title: The Coziest Carriage
desc: When Scat Cat's home in the junkyard disappears one day, Duchess, O'Malley and their kittens come up with a new place for their pal! See how this family helps their friend when he needs them most.

title: Beauty And The Beast
desc: With this sweet collection of Disney Princess stories, little ones will fall asleep dreaming of fairy-tale endings and happily ever afters.

title: Belle And The Castle Puppy
desc: Belle gets a puppy, making Ottoman jealous because he misses being a real dog. He runs into the woods, and Belle and the puppy must rescue him.

title: Belle And The Perfect Pearl
desc: When Belle finds the Beast's favourite book, she sees that the leather cover is worn out. Belle decides to look for the missing pearl and fix up the book for the Beast as a surprise!

title: Belle's Friendship Invention
desc: When Belle sees a crowd gathered around a blue ribbon-winning invention, she volunteers to help the inventor-a girl named Simone-demonstrate how her machine works.

title: Something More
desc: Illustrated throughout with fantastic film stills this book presents an overview of the people, places, and creatures to be found in the magical tale of Beauty and the Beast.

title: I Am Baymax
desc: This is a comedy-adventure about brilliant robotics prodigy Hiro Hamada, who finds himself in the grips of a criminal plot that threatens to destroy the fast-paced, high-tech city of San Fransokyo.

title: Baymax's Journey
desc: Read along with Disney! Follow Baymax as he travels through San Fransokyo in this charming storybook featuring word for word narration.

title: Big Hero 6
desc: Hiro, a smart kid, lives in San Fransokyo. A crime threatens the city. With friends and Baymax, a robot, Hiro becomes a hero. They must save their home!

title: Fight To The Finish
desc: Someone stole Hiro's invention and is using it for evil! Hiro must join forces with his friends and a robot named Baymax to save San Fransokyo before it's too late!

title: Cars
desc: Lightning McQueen takes to the track in three tales of speed! Follow along with word-for-word narration in this level one World of Reading reader bind up featuring Cars, Racing Days, etc.

title: Driving Buddies
desc: Lightning McQueen, a race car, gets lost and finds friends in a small town. He learns important life lessons. Get ready for an exciting adventure!

title: Driving School
desc: Lightning McQueen and Mater must teach hot rod racers the rules of Radiator Springs. This story features characters from Disney/Pixar's Cars, promising a fun-filled adventure for young readers.

title: Racing Days
desc: Doc and Chick Hicks hold 3 races to see whose racing school is best. While Doc's student racers follow the rules, Chick's student racers bend them.

title: Racing For Good
desc: Lightning McQueen and Jeff Gorvette love to race, but there is one thing they love more: helping others. In this action-packed storybook, Lightning and his friends race to raise money to help old cars.

title: Rally To The Finish
desc: Lightning and Mater travel to the Black Forest for a race. Lightning is excited to race through the forest, but Mater gets scared when an old car tells them that a monster lives there.

title: Roadwork
desc: Lightning McQueen, a race car, wants to win the Piston Cup. He ends up in Radiator Springs. McQueen learns that friendship is important.

title: Francesco's Rematch
desc: Lightning McQueen and his racing rival Francesco Bernoulli challenge each other to a race in Monza, Italy-Francesco's hometown. Both Lightning and Francesco are confident they will win the race.

title: Mater And The Ghost Light
desc: Mater the tow truck loves pranking his friends. But after he hears a scary story, Mater loses all zest for pranking. Now, he just wants to hide!

title: Mater The Greater
desc: Mater the Greater is a brave stunt performer who does many dangerous things in front of crowds. He jumps cars, flies through fire, and rides planes. Now, can he do his biggest stunt?

title: Mater's Junkyard Jamboree
desc: Mater can't wait to show his friends in Radiator Springs the junkyard jukebox he built, but they are too busy rounding up tractors on the loose-and the tractors are causing trouble everywhere they go!

title: Monster Truck Mater
desc: To become a world-champion monster truck wrestler, Mater must go through the ranks as a professional. I-Screamer, Captain Collision, and The Rasta Carian won't give up easily.

title: Neon Racers
desc: Lightning McQueen and his international racing friends are in Japan for the next leg of the T-ROC-the Transcontinental Race of Champions. But this isn't a normal race.it's a neon race!

title: Radiator Springs Road Trip
desc: Lightning McQueen's friends travel to California to support him in a race. They discover a rival is plotting against him and rush to warn him.

title: Rescue Squad Mater
desc: If there is a fire in Radiator Springs, Rescue Squad Mater is on the job! One day his best friend Lightning McQueen gets trapped in a burning building, and itis up to Mater to save him.

title: The Best Present Ever
desc: If there is a fire in Radiator Springs, Rescue Squad Mater is on the job! One day his best friend Lightning McQueen gets trapped in a burning building, and itis up to Mater to save him.

title: Thunder And Lightning
desc: Lightning McQueen, the hot-shot rookie race car, is on his way to the race of a lifetime to claim the coveted Piston Cup. But Lightning hits a bump in the road along his journey.

title: Tractor Trouble
desc: Lightning and Mater want to relax by tractor tipping. They accidentally release the tractors! Can they round them up in time? Read along to find out in this fun adventure!

title: Unidentified Flying Mater
desc: Mater decides to teach it all his favorite things to do on Earth. But when the UFO is kidnapped, Mater must go undercover to rescue his friend.

title: Race Around The World
desc: All the world's a racetrack as superstar Lightning McQueen zooms back into action, with his best friend Mater in tow, to take on the globe's fastest and finest.

title: Secret Agent Mater
desc: Mater is a spy car and he has been instructed to catch bad cars! Follow along with word-for-word narration to see what spy life is like for Mater and his friends.

title: Super Spies
desc: All the world's a racetrack as superstar Lightning McQueen zooms back into action, with his best friend Mater in tow, to take on the globe's fastest and finest in DisneyPixar Cars 2.

title: Back On Track
desc: Read along with Disney! Follow along with word-for-word narration and meet Lightning McQueen, Cruz Ramirez, and the rest of the crew from Cars 3!

title: Rectangle
desc: Rectangle invites young viewers on a cheerful learning journey about shapes! With colorful visuals, fun stories, and songs, kids discover all the cool things rectangles can do.

title: Oval
desc: Oval takes kids on a fun, educational adventure to learn about shapes, especially the oval! With catchy songs and lovable characters, it's a delightful way to explore geometry.

title: Feel Better
desc: Join your favorite Disney characters as they help little ones understand emotions, stay healthy, and feel better with heartwarming stories, songs, and comforting advice.

title: Five Senses
desc: Explore the wonders of sight, sound, smell, taste, and touch with beloved Disney characters as they guide young viewers through fun adventures that celebrate the five senses.

title: Let Your Smile Shine
desc: Let Your Smile Shine celebrates the power of positivity as cheerful characters share joyful moments, spreading kindness and reminding kids how a simple smile can brighten any day.

title: Happy
desc: Join your favorite Disney and Pixar characters and explore the feeling of being happy.

title: Love
desc: Love is a heartwarming tale that teaches kids about caring, kindness, and friendship through magical stories filled with lovable characters and beautiful life lessons.

title: Sad
desc: Join your favorite Disney and Pixar characters and explore the feeling of being sad.

title: Surprised
desc: Join your favorite Disney and Pixar characters and explore the feeling of being surprised.

title: Hexagon
desc: Explore the magical world of Hexagon, where six curious friends use shapes, puzzles, and teamwork to solve everyday problems and go on fun-filled adventures.

title: Diamond
desc: When a curious boy discovers a glowing diamond in the forest, he unleashes a series of magical events. Now, he must protect the gem from greedy hunters and restore balance.

title: Healthy Foods
desc: Join Disney characters as they explore the world of healthy eating, teaching kids the importance of fruits, vegetables, and balanced meals through fun songs and stories.

title: Bedtime Plan
desc: Skeeter Bronson, a hotel handyman, discovers that the imaginative bedtime stories he tells his niece and nephew magically start coming true, changing his life in unexpected ways.

desc: From lavender fields in France, to the blue waters of the Philippines, colors are all around. The book includes brand-new artwork inspired by Mary Blair's original art

title: Our Perfect Stormy Day
desc: Read along with Disney! When a storm hits the island, Moana, Heihei, and Pua head to Gramma Tala's for story time. Follow along with word-for-word narration as they all enjoy the perfect stormy day!

title: Hello, Olaf
desc: We all know Olaf loves warm hugs, but did you know he also wants to go sailing? Find out even more about this adorable snowman.

title: A Tight Squeeze
desc: Read along with Disney! Buzz, Woody, and all their pals decide to play a new game. Follow along with word-for-word narration as the toys learn the true meaning of the word 'sardines'.

title: Bella'S Big Break
desc: Doc McStuffins helps Bella the ballerina doll overcome her fear after breaking her leg. With friends' support, Bella learns to dance again, proving courage and care can heal both body and spirit.

title: Game On
desc: Wreck-It Ralph has worked as the Bad Guy in this game for 30 years, and he's tired! Why can't he have a medal and friends like his game's Good Guy? Ralph decides to take matters into his own hands.

title: Meet Fawn The Animal-Talent Fairy
desc: Fawn loves all the animals in Pixie Hollow. When Fawn makes an unusual furry friend, she must prove to the fairies that they can trust this warm hearted beast.

title: Olaf's Summer Day
desc: Join Olaf the snowman as he imagines all the things he would do during his perfect summer day! He dreams of relaxing on a beach, making water angels and drinking hot chocolate filled with marshmallows.

title: Monsters University
desc: Find out how it all began for Mike and Sulley at Monsters University.

title: Boo To You, Winnie The Pooh
desc: Read along with Disney! With this collection of spooky Halloween stories, little ones will be tricked and treated off to sleep with some of their favorite Disney and Pixar characters.

title: Frozen 2
desc: Elsa, Anna, and friends go to the Enchanted Forest. They want to know about the past and Elsa's power. The story follows their adventure closely.

title: Incredibles 2
desc: The Incredibles 2 movie, with fun and emotions, has a superhero family. In the latest chapter, Mr. and Mrs. Incredible, Violet, Dash, and Jack-Jack encounter a new nemesis who challenges their power.

title: Outside My Window
desc: For all her life, Rapunzel has been locked inside a tower. She has just one wish on her 18th birthday is to venture out of her tower to see the floating lights! Find out if her wish will come true!

title: Our Perfect Stormy Day
desc: Read along with Disney! When a storm hits the island, Moana, Heihei, and Pua head to Gramma Tala's for story time. Follow along with word-for-word narration as they all enjoy the perfect stormy day!

title: Happy Valentine'S Day
desc: Celebrate Valentine's Day with Mickey, Minnie, and friends! Enjoy three sweet stories about sharing love and fun. Perfect for preschoolers learning about Valentine's traditions.

title: Old Mcmickey Had A Farm
desc: Mickey and his friends are fixing up a farm. A runaway tractor ruins everything before the mayor's visit! Mickey must stop the tractor, repair the farm, and save the day.

title: One Unicorny Day
desc: All your favorite Disney Junior characters are present in this anthology of stories. Join Zany's adventures with Mickey and friends and complete missions with Bingo and Rolly.

title: A Walk In The Park
desc: Minnie, Daisy, and Cuckoo-Loca enjoy a dog walk until a hot dog cart appears. The pups chase it, leading to chaos. Minnie tries to regain control before things get too ruff!

title: Mickey'S Spooky Night
desc: Read about your favorite Disney characters and their spooky adventures!

title: Mickey And The Beanstalk
desc: Featuring six classic Mickey Mouse tales, this collection of stories is perfect for little ones at bedtime or any time!

title: Mickey'S Birthday
desc: It's Mickey Mouse's birthday, and he's sure his friends are throwing him a party. There's just one problem . . . there are no signs of a party. Have Mickey's friends forgotten all about his big day?

title: Mickey's Christmas Carol
desc: Join Mickey and his friends in a series of tales that will warm your heart. In this story, mean old Ebenezer Scrooge is visited by several ghosts urging him to be more generous and kind-hearted.

title: Mickey'S Spooky Night
desc: Read about your favorite Disney characters and their spooky adventures!

title: Vote For Minnie
desc: Minnie runs for president of the Adventure Club. But Pete is also running! Who will win and be elected the next president?

title: Mickey And The Kitten-Sitters
desc: Enjoy quick, charming Disney and Pixar bedtime stories! Join Anna, Elsa, Mickey, Minnie, and Scamp in exciting adventures. These five-minute tales are perfect for ending the day.

title: Minnie Saves Christmas
desc: With this sweet collection of Disney Christmas stories, little ones are sure to be carried off to sleep full of holiday cheer.

title: The Haunted Halloween
desc: With this collection of spooky Halloween stories, little ones will be tricked and treated off to sleep with some of their favorite Disney and Pixar characters.

title: Minnie's Surprise
desc: Minnie and Daisy are hired to babysit Clara Cluck's egg, but it begins to hatch on their watch! Follow as the Happy Helpers try to get the mama hen and her egg back together in time.

title: Race For The Rigatoni Ribbon
desc: Mickey and the gang head to Italy to compete in the Race for the Rigatoni Ribbon. Do the Roadster Racers have a chance at winning the race? Follow along with word-for-word narration to find out!

title: A Hot-Dog Day
desc: When Minnie plans a picnic for Daisy and friends, they all pitch in with the help of a misplaced basket.

title: Minnie-rella
desc: The fairy tale is based on the story of Cindrella. Minnie Mouse falls asleep while doing chores and dreams that she becomes Minnierella! She needs help to get ready for Prince Mickey's Grand Ball.

title: Colors All Around
desc: Join Mickey, Minnie, and the rest of the gane as they search for their favorite colors. Follow along with word-for-word narration and help them find all the colors in the rainbow!

title: Mickey Saves Santa
desc: Mickey and his friends are all ready for a Christmas Eve sleepover at the Clubhouse. They've written their lists and can't wait for Santa Claus to arrive. Santa won't be coming unless he gets some help!

title: Mickey's Easter Hunt
desc: The Clubhouse pals are throwing an Easter party and Pete's upset because he thinks he isn't invited. Pete decides to make a change in the Clubhouse, he makes it disappear-with the friends still inside!

title: Mickey's Halloween Treat
desc: Mickey and his friends want to go to the Tower, for the Halloween party but, they have to get there before the moon is full! Toodles and Mouseketools are what Mickey need to find on his way to the tower.

title: Minnie's Rainbow
desc: In this colorful tale, Minnie Mouse simply explains how these beautiful apparitions are formed. Follow the narration as Minnie and her Clubhouse pals begin to see a world of rainbows around them.

title: Top O' The Clubhouse
desc: It's Saint Patrick's Day. Mickey and the gang are ready to celebrate! But when Pete's shenanigans threaten to ruin their celebration, it will take some help from Toodles, to get the party back on track.

title: Homesick
desc: Being sick is no fun for anyone, but Funny's sneezes are extra funny! Every sneeze sends Mickey, Minnie, and the rest of the gang through the wrong Adventure Doors. Will Funny ever feel better?

title: Donald'S Stinky Day
desc: When Donald accidentally rescues a cute little skunk, the grateful little stinker refuses to leave his side!

title: Mickey'S Perfecto Day
desc: Mickey and the Roadster Racers head to Madrid, Spain for some racing and sightseeing fun. But when a baby bull begins to chase them around town, their perfecto vacation starts to crumble!

title: Ski Trippin
desc: The gang is teaching Daisy to ski when she accidentally ends up in the middle of aa big skiing race! Using the skills she's learned along the way, can she pull off a big win?

title: Hocus Bow-Cus
desc: Minnie is launching her new 'Bows are Magical' fashion line. He forgot his bow tie at home, he rushes off to find it. Millie and Melody rehearsed with Penguini, but will they remember all the tricks?

title: Minnie's Pet Salon
desc: Minnie and friends get ready to pamper their pets at Minnie's Pet Salon! It's a spa day like no other for Pluto, Figaro, Bella, Butch, and Mr. Pettibone!

title: The Case Of The Missing Sparkle-izer
desc: Who's been using Minnie's new Sparkle-izer? When Minnie needs it to decorate her customers' bows, the Super Sparkle-izer turns up missing! It's up to Millie and Melody to solve the mystifying mystery!

title: Always In Fashion
desc: Minnie Mouse is always in fashion! She and Daisy love making bows at Minnie's Bow-tique. All of their friends want Minnie to make them bows.

title: Blooming Bows
desc: Minnie's nieces are very upset! The paper petals on their costumes are falling apart. Now, it''s up to Minnie to redesign the girls' costumes. But can she do it in time for the school's Posy Pageant?
